output:
CVE-2025-24644 is a Medium severity vulnerability identified as a Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) issue (CWE-79) within the WebToffee WooCommerce PDF Invoices, Packing Slips, Delivery Notes, and Shipping Labels plugin for WordPress. This flaw arises from improper neutralization of user-controlled input, which can be embedded into web pages served to other users.

Affected versions of the plugin range from an unspecified start version up to, but not including, 4.7.2. Users of the vulnerable versions may risk exposing their sites to potential XSS attacks, which could lead to unauthorized actions on behalf of logged-in users or data theft.

Mitigation techniques include applying appropriate input validation and sanitization practices. Users are advised to update to a patched version, specifically version 4.7.2 or later, to secure their sites. Referenced MITRE ATT&CK technique T1203 may provide further context on exploitation strategies related to this vulnerability.
